title: IR: Estimate the C-O Wavenumber
bodyText: Estimate the wavenumber of the strongest C-O absorption in $cm^{-1}$.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would be an annotated IR spectrum focused on the fingerprint region near 1250 cm^-1.

feedbacks: Correct: the absorption is close to 1245 cm^-1.
Too low. Move toward the strong band centered a little above 1240 cm^-1.
Too high. The band maximum is closer to 1245 cm^-1.
